summary: Tested duplicates preview + persistent badge feature end-to-end on demo tenant (shefford had no seeded admin). Backend endpoint GET /{tenant}/import/duplicates/count-by-type works correctly: proper aggregation, auth required, consistent shape. Frontend sidebar badge, in-app toast notification, Paramètres>Imports CSV>Doublons tab, side-by-side comparison table, and 'Prévisualiser fusion' / 'Prévisualiser remplacement' toggle buttons all verified working by seeding a test duplicate and observing UI behavior. Test duplicate was cleaned up.
action_items: Shefford tenant currently has NO user 'gussdub@gmail.com' seeded (login returns 401 with 'found=False' in backend logs). Iteration_31 claimed this user existed in shefford - it does NOT exist now. If shefford testing credentials are required, main agent should reseed the admin via the appropriate tenant migration script, OR update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to reflect that shefford has no seeded admin.

Minor UX: Add data-testid attributes to 'Prévisualiser fusion' (e.g., data-testid='preview-merge-{dup.id}') and 'Prévisualiser remplacement' (data-testid='preview-replace-{dup.id}') buttons in ImportDuplicatesManager.jsx for more robust automation. Currently these rely on get_by_text which worked but less reliable.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes/import_batch.py L688-741: count_duplicates_by_type uses clean Mongo aggregation, returns total + by_type dict + pre-formatted french message. Labels dict covers main entity types. Good.

Sidebar.jsx L160-209: loadDuplicatesCount polls every 60s, RBAC gate (admin/super_admin/directeur), session-scoped toast dedup via sessionStorage['lastDuplicatesNotified']. Correctly re-notifies only when total changes. Good.

ImportDuplicatesManager.jsx L320-343: Preview buttons lack data-testid (they use text only). Consider adding for test robustness. currentPreview state is per-dup.id which correctly scopes preview independently for each duplicate card.

ParametresImports.jsx L29-99: Tab 'doublons' has its own badge (duplicatesCount) independent of Sidebar's state - two separate fetches. Minor duplication but acceptable since tabs can be opened directly.
No console errors observed during full flow. Toast has 8s duration - may feel short if message is long, acceptable.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 testable flows verified: sidebar badge, toast, tab badge, preview fusion, preview remplacement

seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted 1 import_duplicates document (id=TEST_DUP_12696506, entity_type=DossierAdresse) in demo tenant to verify badge+toast+preview UI, then deleted it after testing. DB state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To test on shefford tenant, first seed an admin user (gussdub@gmail.com or any) because login currently fails with 'found=False'. For testing the duplicates UI flow when no real duplicates exist, seed a test duplicate directly via MongoDB (see /tmp/seed_duplicate.py for template). The endpoint /{tenant}/import/duplicates/count-by-type is tenant-scoped so works for any tenant.

verification_evidence.sidebar_badge: Red circular badge with text '1' and title '1 doublon(s): 1 bâtiment(s)' shown on Paramètres nav item
verification_evidence.toast: Toast '📋 1 doublon(s) détecté(s)' displayed bottom-right with 'Voir' action button
verification_evidence.tab_badge: Doublons tab in Imports CSV shows badge with '1' count
verification_evidence.preview_merge: Clicking 'Prévisualiser fusion' turns button green-highlighted, comparison table adds 'Résultat fusion' column (green heading)
verification_evidence.preview_replace: Clicking 'Prévisualiser remplacement' turns button blue-highlighted, comparison table swaps to 'Résultat remplacement' column (blue heading)
